name: ICP Calibration v1 - Win Pattern Fingerprint

nodes.name: Get People.ai Auth Token
nodes.notes: Get OAuth token from People.ai. Client ID and secret now referenced from Workflow Parameters node.

parameters.text:
=Analyze the activity timeline for account "{{ $json.accountName }}" (People.ai Account ID: {{ $json.accountId }}).

Use the People.ai MCP tools:
1. Call get_recent_account_activity to pull the last 90 days of activity
2. Call get_engaged_people to see who's involved

For this account, extract:
- Total meetings in last 90 days and their cadence (weekly? bi-weekly? sporadic?)
- Meeting-to-email ratio
- Number of unique external contacts and their seniority mix
- Whether new stakeholders were introduced over time (committee formation)
- Email responsiveness pattern (bi-directional or one-way?)
- Any executive engagement pattern (when did execs enter, how often?)

Output as structured JSON:
{
  "account_name": "{{ $json.accountName }}",
  "meetings_90d": N,
  "meeting_cadence": "weekly/biweekly/sporadic/declining",
  "meeting_ratio": 0.XX,
  "unique_contacts": N,
  "exec_contacts": N,
  "exec_ratio": 0.XX,
  "committee_formed": true/false,
  "new_stakeholders_last_30d": N,
  "email_responsiveness": 0.XX,
  "exec_entry_timing": "early/mid/late/never",
  "engagement_arc": "accelerating/steady/front-loaded/sporadic"
}

options.systemMessage: You are a sales engagement analyst specializing in activity pattern recognition. Analyze People.ai data to extract structured behavioral patterns. Always output valid JSON.
You are a world-class ICP analyst. Be precise, data-driven, and specific. Use actual numbers from the data. Every claim must be backed by the cohort comparison data.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ response_type: 'in_channel', text: $json.message, unfurl_links: false, unfurl_media: false }) }}
